description: Create a VictoriaMetrics snapshot via /snapshot/create, optionally with retention-based cleanup of older snapshots. Job-shaped; can be scheduled.

base_url_env_var.label: Base URL Env Var
base_url_env_var.description: Env var with VictoriaMetrics base URL (e.g. http://localhost:8428).

snapshot_auth_key_env_var.label: Snapshot Auth Key Env Var
snapshot_auth_key_env_var.description: Env var with VM -snapshotAuthKey value (sent as ?authKey=…). Required when VM is started with -snapshotAuthKey.

bearer_token_env_var.label: Bearer Token Env Var
bearer_token_env_var.description: Env var with bearer token (for vmauth-fronted clusters).

retention_hours.label: Retention Hours
retention_hours.description: If set, delete snapshots older than this many hours after each successful create. None disables auto-delete.

group_name.label: Group Name
group_name.description: Asset/op group name (op naming only — this is a job).
